THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT [SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT]

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HOT FOCUS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH THE HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE. THE COURT EXECUTES THE PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT SUBMITTED WITH THE PAPERS. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: REYES HUNTER, CSR #6576, EMAIL:RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG. (302)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Hot Focus, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Tuttle, Esq. (510-848-8880) of the Chanler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAUL WOZNIAK'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Hot Focus, Inc.

The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) The court executes the proposed order and judgment submitted with the papers. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)
